title: justicia ruwenzoriensis
intro: Justicia ruwenzoriensis, also known as Rwenzori water-witch, is a plant species native to the Rwenzori Mountains in East Africa, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia ruwenzoriensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections, as well as supporting immune function and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
